summary: Swarm budget exhausted for March (all 4 drivers at 100%) — resets April 1. PRs #158 (portable path fix) and #154 (strategy update) merged. PR #155 (EM schedule stagger) P0 reviewed and approved; flagged for human merge per worker pool escalation rule. PR #472 (agentguard-cloud dashboard filter) still awaiting human merge. studio-sr flakiness (71%, issue #156) likely quota-related given March 27 cascade event — needs log review after April 1 budget reset. QA agents on bench still broken (#146). Budget reset April 1 should resolve most quota-driven failures; schedule stagger (#155) will prevent recurrence.
